executives.name: Aris Morfopoulos
executives.background: Mr. Morfopoulos is a senior executive with over 30 years of experience in corporate management and finance. He has served as a director and officer for several public companies in the resource sector.

executives.name: Chris Verrico
executives.background: Mr. Verrico has over 40 years of experience in the mining and exploration industry. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies, including Xiana Mining Inc. and various junior exploration companies. He has extensive experience in project management and corporate development.
